title: MAX FPS Balance
description: MAX FPS Balance is the essential middle-tier modpack for 3-4 GB RAM systems. It achieves high FPS by pure optimization, keeping all default aesthetic features without adding demanding shaders.
body:
# MAX FPS Balance: The ESSENTIAL Mid-Tier Performance Solution

**Engineered by Z.XP.XP.900. Achieve High FPS While Preserving Aesthetics (3GB-4GB RAM).**

MAX FPS Balance is designed as the crucial middle ground in the Z.XP.XP.900 performance lineup. This pack focuses on delivering **stable, high Frame Rates Per Second (FPS) by pure optimization**, without the aggressive visual cuts of the Lite version or the heavy RAM demand of the Pro version. This is the perfect choice for the majority of players running **3GB to 4GB of dedicated RAM** who refuse to sacrifice the default beauty of Minecraft.

## ⚙️ Core Architecture: Purity, Stability, and RAM Management

### A. Aesthetic Preservation (No Visual Degradation)

* **Default Visuals Intact:** All default visual features (clouds, water, base lighting) are kept, focusing on smoother performance rather than removal.
* **Balanced Rendering Pipeline:** Utilizes optimized versions of rendering mods like **Sodium** and **Iris (Essentials)** for efficient visual load handling.

### B. Mod Stability Protocol

All included mods are carefully selected for **long-term stability and security**. If a mod fails to release stable support for the latest Minecraft version, it will be formally and permanently removed from this mod list to maintain the integrity and stability of the Balance experience. The mod list is **fixed and optimized for this version** to prevent conflicts.

## 💾 System Requirements & Target Audience

| System Component | Ideal Requirement | Target Performance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Dedicated RAM** | 3 GB - 4 GB | Consistent 90+ FPS |
| **Goal** | High FPS while maintaining Vanilla Look | Mid-Tier Hardware Solution |

---

## 🔗 The Z.XP.XP.900 Performance Tiers (Select by System)

This **MAX FPS Series** is engineered for optimal performance on different hardware levels. **Install the pack that matches your RAM and performance goal:**

| Hardware Focus | Project Name | Project Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Ultra-Lite (2-3 GB RAM)** | [MAX FPS Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/max-fps-lite) | [Install Now](https://modrinth.com/modpack/max-fps-lite) |
| **Mid-Tier (3-4 GB RAM)** | [MAX FPS Balance](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-balance) | **(Current Project)** |
| **High-End (16+ GB RAM)** | [MAX FPS Pro](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-pro) | [Install Now](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-pro) |

---
# Mandatory Final Note

Thank you for selecting this optimized Modpack from Z.XP.XP.900. We are committed to high-performance competitive and utility Minecraft content, continually expanding our portfolio towards **100+ projects**!

---
